channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年5月21日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Meta blocks human rights accounts from reaching audiences in Arabia and the UAE #2 Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment #3 Qwen3.7-Max: The Agent Frontier #4 Saying Goodbye to Asm.js #5 SBCL: The Assembly Code Breadboard (2014) #6 Map of Metal #7 Google's AI is being manipulated. The search giant is quietly fighting back #8 Victory: Tennessee man jailed 37 days for Trump meme wins $835,000 settlement #9 Formal Verification Gates for AI Coding Loops #10 Everything in C is undefined behavior
